fields.name: Object Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of object that contains the called event.

fields.name: Object ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the object that contains the called event.

fields.name: Object Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the object that contains the called event.

fields.name: Event Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the called event.

fields.name: Event Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the event that is called.

fields.name: Call Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order in which the events are called.

fields.name: Element Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the element in which the event is called.

fields.name: Calling Object Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the object that calls the event.

fields.name: Calling Object ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the object that calls the event.

fields.name: Calling Object Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the object that calls the event.

fields.name: Calling Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of method that calls the event.

fields.name: Hit Count
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of time this event is called consecutively.
